sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66031" key="meli/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελί-παις</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σίμβλος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, the hive <sense id="n66031.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with its honey-children,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.249</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
